title: SQL: LIKE incorrect with _
poc: select * from x where a like 'abc%';
select * from x where a like 'abc|aap%';
select * from x where a like 'abc|aap_%';
select * from x where a like 'abc|aap_%' escape '_';
key_bug_features: LIKE operator fails with underscore wildcard
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name CLOB, description CLOB);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'abc|aap_%' ESCAPE '|';
